metadata.description: Naming prefix for all resources (e.g., herald)
Resource tags applied to all resources
PostgreSQL administrator password (supply at deploy time, never in param files)
PostgreSQL Entra token scope (same across cloud instances)
CPU cores for the Container App
Memory for the Container App (ImageMagick workloads need headroom)
Use Azure Container Registry instead of GHCR (for IL6 air-gapped environments)
GitHub username for GHCR authentication (ignored when useAcr is true)
GitHub PAT for GHCR authentication (ignored when useAcr is true)
Enable Azure Entra authentication for the web client
Azure Entra tenant ID (required when authEnabled is true)
Entra app registration client ID (required when authEnabled is true)
Name of the user-assigned managed identity
Full resource ID of hte managed identity
Principal (object) ID - used for role assignments
Client ID - used fro AZURE_CLIENT_ID and DB user
Name of the Log Analytics workspace
Number of days to retain logs
Workspace customer ID (needed by Container App Environment)
Workspace name (needed by Container App Environment)
Principal ID of the managed identity to configure as Entra admin
Display name for the Entra admin
Prinicipal type for the Entra admin
Allow Azure services to access the server
Fully qualified domain name of hte PostgreSQL server
Storage account name (globally unique, 3-24 lowercase alphanumeric)
Storage account resource ID (for role assignment scope)
Custom subdomain name for the account endpoint
Cognitive Services account resource ID (for role assignment scope)
Azure Container Registry name (globally unique, 5-50 alphanumeric)
ACR resource ID (for role assignment scope)
Log Analytics workspace name (used to resolve listKeys internally)
Principal ID of the managed identity to assign roles to
Storage account resource ID (scope for Storage Blob Data Contributor)
Cognitive Services account resource ID (scope for OpenAI User)
ACR resource ID (scope for AcrPull, required when assignAcrPull is true)

parameters.registries: [if(parameters('useAcr'), createObject('value', createArray(createObject('server', if(parameters('useAcr'), coalesce(tryGet(tryGet(tryGet(if(parameters('useAcr'), reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('{0}-registry', parameters('prefix'))), '2025-04-01'), null()), 'outputs'), 'loginServer'), 'value'), ''), ''), 'identity', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('{0}-identity', parameters('prefix'))), '2025-04-01').outputs.id.value))), createObject('value', variables('ghcrRegistries')))]

envVars.value: [concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'HERALD_ENV', 'value', 'azure'), createObject('name', 'HERALD_SERVER_PORT', 'value', '8080'), createObject('name', 'HERALD_DB_HOST', 'value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('{0}-postgres', parameters('prefix'))), '2025-04-01').outputs.fqdn.value), createObject('name', 'HERALD_DB_PORT', 'value', '5432'), createObject('name', 'HERALD_DB_NAME', 'value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('{0}-postgres', parameters('prefix'))), '2025-04-01').outputs.databaseName.value), createObject('name', 'HERALD_DB_USER', 'value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('{0}-identity', parameters('prefix'))), '2025-04-01').outputs.clientId.value), createObject('name', 'HERALD_DB_SSL_MODE', 'value', 'require'), createObject('name', 'HERALD_DB_TOKEN_SCOPE', 'value', parameters('postgresTokenScope')), createObject('name', 'HERALD_STORAGE_SERVICE_URL', 'value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('{0}-storage', parameters('prefix'))), '2025-04-01').outputs.blobEndpoint.value), createObject('name', 'HERALD_STORAGE_CONTAINER_NAME', 'value', 'documents'), createObject('name', 'HERALD_AUTH_MODE', 'value', if(parameters('authEnabled'), 'azure', 'none')), createObject('name', 'HERALD_AUTH_MANAGED_IDENTITY', 'value', 'true'), createObject('name', 'HERALD_AUTH_AGENT_SCOPE', 'value', 'https://cognitiveservices.azure.com/.default'), createObject('name', 'HERALD_AGENT_PROVIDER_NAME', 'value', 'azure'), createObject('name', 'HERALD_AGENT_BASE_URL', 'value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('{0}-cognitive', parameters('prefix'))), '2025-04-01').outputs.endpoint.value), createObject('name', 'HERALD_AGENT_DEPLOYMENT', 'value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('{0}-cognitive', parameters('prefix'))), '2025-04-01').outputs.modelDeploymentName.value), createObject('name', 'HERALD_AGENT_API_VERSION', 'value', '2025-04-01-preview'), createObject('name', 'HERALD_AGENT_AUTH_TYPE', 'value', 'managed_identity'), createObject('name', 'AZURE_CLIENT_ID', 'value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('{0}-identity', parameters('prefix'))), '2025-04-01').outputs.clientId.value)), variables('authEnvVars'))]

metadata.description: CPU cores allocated to the container

parameters.registries: [if(parameters('useAcr'), createObject('value', createArray(createObject('server', if(parameters('useAcr'), coalesce(tryGet(tryGet(tryGet(if(parameters('useAcr'), reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('{0}-registry', parameters('prefix'))), '2025-04-01'), null()), 'outputs'), 'loginServer'), 'value'), ''), ''), 'identity', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('{0}-identity', parameters('prefix'))), '2025-04-01').outputs.id.value))), createObject('value', variables('ghcrRegistries')))]

databaseDsn.value: [format('postgres://{0}:{1}@{2}:5432/{3}?sslmode=require', parameters('postgresAdminLogin'), parameters('postgresAdminPassword'), reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('{0}-postgres', parameters('prefix'))), '2025-04-01').outputs.fqdn.value, reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('{0}-postgres', parameters('prefix'))), '2025-04-01').outputs.databaseName.value)]

metadata.description: Container image reference (same image as the app)
CPU cores allocated to the job container
Memory allocated to the job container
ACR login server (empty when using GHCR)
